zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Comyn於大約1205年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵時，她的父親William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan43歲，母親Sarah FitzHugh40歲。她於大約1230年與William I Earl of Ross在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1274年在英國蘇格蘭希倫德可洛馬迪享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean Comyn于大约1205年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵时，她的父亲William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan43岁，母亲Sarah FitzHugh40岁。她于大约1230年与William I Earl of Ross在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1274年在英国苏格兰希倫德可洛馬迪享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Comyn was born about 1205, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, her father, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, was 43 and her mother, Sarah FitzHugh, was 40. She married William I Earl of Ross about 1230, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1274, in Cromarty, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean Comyn est née environ 1205, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Sarah FitzHugh, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé William I Earl of Ross environ 1230, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1274, à Cromarty, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Comyn um 1205 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan 43 und ihre Mutter Sarah FitzHugh 40. Sie hat um 1230 in Scotland William I Earl of Ross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1274 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Cromarty, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Comyn è nata il circa 1205 nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, sua padre, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Sarah FitzHugh, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato William I Earl of Ross circa 1230, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1274, nel Cromarty, Highland, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean Comynが約1205年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで生まれた時，父William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchanは43歳，母Sarah FitzHughは40歳であった。約1230年にスコットランドでWilliam I Earl of Rossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1274年にイギリススコットランドヒグhランドクロマルトイで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean Comyn(이)가 대략 1205년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah FitzHugh(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1230년 스컷랜드에서 William I Earl of Ross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1274년 영국 스코틀랜드 히랜드 크로마티에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Comyn nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Sarah FitzHugh, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com William I Earl of Ross aproximadamente 1230, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1274, em Cromarty, Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Comyn родилась около 1205 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah FitzHugh, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William I Earl of Ross около 1230 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1274 г. в местности кромерти, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean Comyn nació aproximadamente 1205, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Sarah FitzHugh, tenía 40 años. Se casó con William I Earl of Ross aproximadamente 1230, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1274, en Cromarty, Highland, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
